mapper.select: SELECT c.id AS conversationId, c.conversation_type AS conversationType, c.conversation_name AS conversationName, c.avatar_url AS avatarUrl, c.last_message_preview AS lastMessagePreview, c.last_message_time AS lastMessageTime, cu.unread_count AS unreadCount, cu.is_top AS isTop FROM im_conversation_user cu JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = cu.conversation_id WHERE cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY cu.is_top DESC, c.last_message_time DESC, c.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM im_conversation_user cu JOIN im_conversation c ON c.id = cu.conversation_id WHERE cu.user_id = #{userId} AND cu.deleted = 0 AND c.status = 1
